entry.title: No more
entry.summary:
Author: ForgottenOne201

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,469Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 91

Summary: After the climax of actions with gerard circumstances push stiles to discover a truce about himself specifically his mother’s bloodline. New complications arise when a pack of alphas arrives in town and between learning more about himself and staying alive stiles falls for a certain grumpy alpha.

entry.title: My mother cursed Derek (english version)
entry.summary:
Author: Marlowe89

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,944Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 37

Summary: Stiles is tired of always being the second best, never anyone's priority. He loves Derek madly, and because of this unrequited feeling, he decides to cast a spell to erase all the emotional attachment he had. Mother Claudia, a ghost who haunts her child, decides to curse Derek.

entry.title: When Werewolves Do Jane Austen Shit
entry.summary:
Author: anarchycox

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,019Chapters: 4/?Kudos: 137

Summary: After the Hale Fire, Laura and Derek, along with Cora, steal comatose Peter out of the hospital. Laura gives up the alpha spark to bring Peter back. But a pack, even the mighty Hales, can only survive so long without an alpha. Derek had always known that he was to be trained for a marriage alliance with another pack, and he will do whatever it takes to keep his family safe. Stiles knows the McCall pack is on borrowed time. They've kept Beacon Hills safe, but they have no money, no history, no respect from the good side of the supernatural world. He knows they need to go to the Summit meeting...party...thing, and make connections or they are screwed. Two groups in desperate need, stuck in a conference hotel in Vegas. Whatever will happen?

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: Shifting Fates
entry.summary:
Author: SarcasmIsMyOnlyDefence24

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 38,338Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 242

Summary: Given the chance to rewrite the past, Stiles wants to fix everything, but he'll have to start at square one. Some bonds are gone, some mistakes can’t be ignored, and some people have to die. Stiles holds everything on his shoulders. Only he knows what happens and only he can save his friends.

entry.title: Of A Butterfly's Wings
entry.summary:
Author: Mikaelsonbich25

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 145,681Chapters: 94/?Kudos: 308

Summary: Klaus had expected to be done with life after sacrificing himself. He was sure that he could finally rest and be done with it. But, much to his dismay, an otherworldly being had other plans, due to finding Klaus as a source of entertainment.In snatching away his desired death, Klaus Mikaelson was reincarnated into another world as a young magic caster named Stiles Stilinski. With no choice but to live, Klaus decides to use this opportunity to take over Beacon Hills and make it his kingdom.And maybe one day, he'll be strong enough to find a way back home to his world.

entry.title: If I could turn back time..... oh wait, I can!
entry.summary:
Author: Werewolfintraining

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 48,792Chapters: 15/?Kudos: 254

Summary: Agent Stilinski received the call late afternoon. He had to return to the Hellmouth in a hurry. He really thought there was enough time. He was prepared to face the demon once again. He was not prepared to see Derek Hale sacrifice himself, again.He has one chance, the cost is high, but Derek and his pup are worth it.He's willing to pay whatever the magic deems worthy.He pays in years, but he gains something unexpected.Ok. Now he's here. Is he supposed to save Peter too?

entry.title: A Very Stilinski Affair
entry.summary:
Author: Christina786

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 64,851Chapters: 11/15Kudos: 22

Summary: Derek frowned. “You Stilinskis really have to be that honest?”She shrugged. “What’s the point in being secretive and mysterious?”Now Derek grinned “Oh, you should meet my uncle, you’d hate him.” This is based on a post on tumblr in which Stiles is afraid that Derek might fall for his sibling once he meets them. It kind of got out of hand and I started indulging in some morally gray but not evil Peter. Basically, Peter falls for Stiles' sister instead, because they kind of bond over their different but slightly similar traumas and it turns out Stiles' sister has been hiding a few bodies in her closet.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Don’t go where I can’t
entry.summary:
Author: WhoSaidImFin

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 8,401Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 31

Summary: Stiles and Derek have been married for two years, and for once, life in Beacon Hills is quiet — until Stiles is brutally attacked while investigating something near a lake and left fighting for his life. Derek is forced to watch helplessly as he’s put on a ventilator, slips into a coma, and nearly dies, and even when Stiles wakes, the wounds don’t heal normally and the nightmares don’t stop. As recovery turns into something far more complicated, both of them struggle with fear, guilt, and the reality that almost losing each other changes everything.

entry.title: Sugar in His Fangs
entry.summary:
Author: meimome

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,555Chapters: 8/?Kudos: 529

Summary: "Everyone has that one ex.Stiles Stilinski just happens to be the one your ancestors warned you about."Five hundred years ago, Klaus Mikaelson made a mistake.Not the kind you forget.Not the kind you forgive.He dumped Stiles Stilinski.The supernatural world learned one thing the hard wayDon’t date Stiles Stilinski.Or if you do, don’t lie. Don’t cheat. Definitely don’t try to rip his heart out.Klaus Mikaelson broke all three rules.Now he runs.And everyone else? They know better than to ask.Stiles isn’t just some ex with a grudge.He’s the original chaos—spark magic fueled by belief, bloodlust sharpened by betrayal, and a memory that doesn’t forget.He didn’t spend centuries chasing Klaus because revenge was his whole life.But when the man you trusted rips out your heart and expects you to still stay, well… let’s just say grudges aren’t the half of it.Now, after years of silence, Stiles rolls into Mystic Falls with nothing but a crooked smile, a carefully honed plan, and a warning:He’s here to stir up more than old ghosts.Maybe it’s Klaus he’s after.Maybe it’s something—or someone—more complicated.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: My Name is Ours at Night
entry.summary:
Author: strawberry_chicken

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 28,095Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 48

Summary: (End season 2) After a ritual gone wrong, Stiles should be dead. Instead, he wakes up with a hole in his body and something inside him—something wrong, something hungry. Derek knows there's a threat in town. He just didn't expect it to look like Stiles.   ------   [--This is my take on a psychological horror story centered on a cosmic entity. It's a slow burn, so brace yourselves. Also, Sterek is the main focus; absolutely everything—EVERYTHING—will revolve around them. I hope it works out as it did in my head.--]

entry.title: Ultimate Guide to Building a Pack
entry.summary:
Author: FinchInTheMines

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 36,310Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 245

Summary: Derek flies off the handle at Stiles after Scott's betrayal, only to realize that Stiles is both injured and looking to check on how he is doing. They don't have a chance to reconcile as they are both captured by hunters working under Gerard. They turn the alpha feral in order to get him to kill Stiles but something different happens instead, leaving the two boys to work out their feelings and issues while recovering from the encounter and trying to rebuild the Hale pack.
